name: Armistead Gardens Elementary School
description: Armistead Gardens Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Baltimore, MD. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Baltimore Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Baltimore Country Club in Baltimore, MD! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms and water. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Bolton Swim & Tennis
description: Bolton Swim & Tennis is a place to play pickleball in Baltimore, MD. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.

description: Clifton Park is a place to play pickleball in Baltimore, MD. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Club Volo at Baltimore Peninsula
description: These courts are owned by Volo. They offer court rentals, leagues, tournaments, and pick-ups. You can pay once or get a membership.
open_play_schedule: The venue is closed mid day
fees: Fee required — starting at $12 an hour and going up to$50 during prime time

name: Club Volo Brewer's Hill
description:
This venue is operated by Volo, you can rent a court, play in a league or get a Volo Pass Membership for $35 per month and play unlimited pick ups. 

This site also has 4 sand volleyball courts.
open_play_schedule: The venue is closed mid day.
fees: Fee required — Starting at $12 and going up to $50 an hour for prime time

name: Coppermine Racquet & Fitness Club - bare hills
description: Come play pickleball at Coppermine Racquet & Fitness Club - bare hills in Baltimore, MD! There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and lights.

name: Druid Hill Park
description: Druid Hill Park is a place to play pickleball in Baltimore, MD. The court surface is hard. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Latrobe Park

name: Latrobe Park Tennis Courts
description:
What's the Dill with pickleball?! We are bringing the world's fastest growing sport to South Baltimore's best pickleball venue. Join us on Monday's at Latrobe park for the paddle revolution with our OUTDOOR pickleball. Up to 2 courts playing at the same time. WE PROVIDE THE PADDLES AND BALLS, you just show up and play!



Highlights
2v2 Pickleball 
equipment provided

Self officiated
open gender
All Skill Levels invited to play



We do not provide refunds. If games are cancelled due to not enough players, we will issue a credit to your account to be used for any other league or pickup.



Included with Volo Pass Membership! Not a Volo Pass member? Become one for just $35/mo & gain access to unlimited pickups & MORE!
fees: Fee required — $10 per registration, FREE with Volo Pass Membership

name: Pickleball House, LLC
description: Pickleball House, LLC is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Baltimore, MD. There are 8 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. name: SOS Pickleball
description: SOS Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Baltimore, MD. There are 2 indoor concrete and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming.
fees: Fee required — $40/hr per court. Open Plays range from $10-$20/hr. (Our members receive discounts and scheduling privileges).
